texto: Cycling keeps me lean and I need to stay in shape, especially as I still like eating chocolate and ice-cream! I like to go mountain biking too. Running is also good; it's what we were designed to do as humans, so it comes naturally.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mark Webber: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Cycling keeps me lean and I need to stay in shape, especially as I still like eating chocolate an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, good, mountain pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mountain e me.
